title: Handle working dogs in stock yards
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Handle working dogs in stock yards demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare yards and dogs for work

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards in stock yards1.2 Identify hazards to the welfare of working dogs in stock yards1.3 Routinely check yards for animal welfare hazards, assess risks, and implement suitable controls1.4 Select, use and maintain suitable Personal Protective Equipment (PPE).1.5 Check dogs before and after work to ensure their condition and health are maintained1.6 Identify and report unhealthy or injured dogs to foreman or manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards in stock yards1.2 Identify hazards to the welfare of working dogs in stock yards1.3 Routinely check yards for animal welfare hazards, assess risks, and implement suitable controls1.4 Select, use and maintain suitable Personal Protective Equipment (PPE).1.5 Check dogs before and after work to ensure their condition and health are maintained1.6 Identify and report unhealthy or injured dogs to foreman or manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards in stock yards1.2 Identify hazards to the welfare of working dogs in stock yards1.3 Routinely check yards for animal welfare hazards, assess risks, and implement suitable controls1.4 Select, use and maintain suitable Personal Protective Equipment (PPE).1.5 Check dogs before and after work to ensure their condition and health are maintained1.6 Identify and report unhealthy or injured dogs to foreman or manager.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare yards and dogs for work

elements.title: Muster and move livestock using working dogs

pcs.text: Identify and explain the relevant sections of applicable animal welfare standards and regulations2.2 Use dogs suitable for the task for working livestock2.3 Explain and demonstrate principles of low stress livestock handling2.4 Follow workplace health and safety and workplace procedures for working with dogs and livestock2.5 Check, muster and move livestock in holding pens, yards and laneways
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and explain the relevant sections of applicable animal welfare standards and regulations2.2 Use dogs suitable for the task for working livestock2.3 Explain and demonstrate principles of low stress livestock handling2.4 Follow workplace health and safety and workplace procedures for working with dogs and livestock2.5 Check, muster and move livestock in holding pens, yards and laneways?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and explain the relevant sections of applicable animal welfare standards and regulations2.2 Use dogs suitable for the task for working livestock2.3 Explain and demonstrate principles of low stress livestock handling2.4 Follow workplace health and safety and workplace procedures for working with dogs and livestock2.5 Check, muster and move livestock in holding pens, yards and laneways.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Muster and move livestock using working dogs

elements.title: Care for working dogs

pcs.text: Explain and follow workplace requirements for housing dogs3.2 Explain workplace health and safety risks associated with working and handling dogs and follow workplace requirements3.3 Explain and meet dietary requirements of working dogs3.4 Clean and check kennels as a part of regular daily routines3.5 Identify common working dog conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain and follow workplace requirements for housing dogs3.2 Explain workplace health and safety risks associated with working and handling dogs and follow workplace requirements3.3 Explain and meet dietary requirements of working dogs3.4 Clean and check kennels as a part of regular daily routines3.5 Identify common working dog conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain and follow workplace requirements for housing dogs3.2 Explain workplace health and safety risks associated with working and handling dogs and follow workplace requirements3.3 Explain and meet dietary requirements of working dogs3.4 Clean and check kennels as a part of regular daily routines3.5 Identify common working dog conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Care for working dogs

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
